sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7144" key="a)naparia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπᾰριάζω</orth>, <sense id="n7144.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">break treaties like the Parians,</tr_> prov. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0536.tlg001:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
